ddt:Target.Name: TCU_GEN2_V2.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Status :
Mise à jour : 15/10/12 Base DiagONCAN TCU version 1.1
Mise à jour : 23/11/12 Base DiagONCAN TCU version 1.2
Mise à jour : 23.03.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.3
Authors : El-Hadi BELKACEM (Tel : 55 368) / Diego Gil Vazquez (Tel. 0034 986 900 300 ext. 460)
Project :L38VEK, X82, X07, X62, 15/40
Correction syntaxe données, Supression de DTC Ajout requête : ouverture de session reprogrammation 1085
Mise à jour 30.05.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.4
Mise à jour 18.06.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.5
Mise à jour 28.06.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.6
Mise à jour 06.08.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.7 - 6C6D not official - 6D16 / 6D17 resized to 2 byte - Screen: Daimler ID added. Current and voltage status SST ERASED SIM parameters update - Routines: SIM Status and GSM Network updated - IO Control : $0A erased
Mise à jour 04.09.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.8 - AutoIddent for D4 defined -DTC devices updated: $AE2462 $93891n - Screen update Part number Renault added
Mise à jour 04.11.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.9 - Screens CANV CANM update - Added TCU Status - Screens for SIM and GSM routines updated
Mise à jour 04.11.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 2.0 - Added DIDs for CCS: $6D30, $6D31 and $6D32 - Screen Service Activation modificated, included CCS reading

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor/ zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: External GSM Antenna
Data.Comment: TCU connected to External GSM Antenna
Data.Description:
Default: 00

00 : No External GSM antenna connection
01 : External GSM Antenna Connection

Data.Name: ECU Reset Type
Data.Comment: Used to request an ECU reset

Data.Name: External GPS Antenna
Data.Comment: TCU connected to External GSM Antenna
Data.Description:
Default: 00

00 : No External GSM antenna connection
01 : External GSM Antenna Connection

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress
Response to control status when test in progress
Response to control status when test in progress

Data.Name: MFD NFA definition
Data.Description: Configuration of USB connection to NFA or MFD or de-actived;

Data.Name: EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging historical.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Battery charging.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charge Spot short term booking.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging Spot Finder 3 points.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Plug In missing.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Remote HVAC control.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging schedular.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging activation or stop by remote.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging Spot Finder upgrade 3 to 24 spots.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Inhibition Desinhibition of Charge as no pay upgrade.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Battery usage and charge history.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Low battery alert upgrade on remote phone.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Internet_widget widget store.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.FLEET Probe service 1.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Charging Spot Finder upgrade availability and compatibility.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.Create private charge spot off board and download OTA.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.LIVE All Tomtom Services.status.activation
EV Service Provisionning Functions configuration.ECO Scoring Challenge Service.status.activation
DRX Configuration.Mode after wake up conditions
DRX Configuration.Hours the TCU will be on DRX mode
DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ExtendedDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Label.Text: Global Check connection to the GDC
Be carrefull , This routine didn't rise the DTC
Send all the datas to the GDC
